title: Glow Ink Plus
description: Add more functions to the glow ink, in this mod you can make the wool and carpets glow
body: ## ![Glow Ink Plus mod](https://i.imgur.com/zjNj5h6.png) ## **~Features~** This mod adds a new use to the glow ink sac that was added in version 1.17, with this new mod you can join wools and carpets with the glow ink to give them a glow that generates a low light intensity (perfect for use with shaders). *The wool textures of the texture packs are supported.* ### **Wools** ![No shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DfZhZ0LX/images/131b8380018e12601fe2733015c362eb34163daa.png) ![With shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DfZhZ0LX/images/7605f04757bf3411840e3321d8827a9db13d33b7.png) ### **Carpets** ![No shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DfZhZ0LX/images/2231d235fb48156f2b353f8bafa0d87a75b882f9.png) ![With shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DfZhZ0LX/images/7a554d8a176fe681dc8be714659ed5c0355e1ad6.png) ### **Recipes** ![Recipes](https://imgur.com/qWPj2pC.png) Shader used: [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) Some translations were generated automatically! [](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=127)
